commit.subject: LU-18199 socklnd: change skip_mr_route_setup default to 1
commit.message:
LU-18199 socklnd: change skip_mr_route_setup default to 1

This is a test patch for checking whether setting of
skip_mr_route_setup ksocklnd module option default to 1
helps prevent occasional issues seen with connectivity
of Ubuntu 24.04 client

Test-Parameters: fortestonly livedebug \
  env=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes \
  clientdistro=ubuntu2404 serverdistro=el9.4 \
  mdscount=2 mdtcount=4 ostcount=7 \
  env=CONF_SANITY_EXCEPT="61b" \
  testlist=conf-sanity

Signed-off-by: Serguei Smirnov <ssmirnov@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Id5cfffaabe6125d25da05302be244e0d3e64a2d9
